_doc: Owner: Terra (this file) + Forge (runner code) + Shield (sandbox primitives).
Status at M0: STUB. Service does not deploy at M0 — first deploy lands at M1
when Forge writes apps/runner/Dockerfile + the runner package.
Egress allowlist (TB-4) enforced at the network-policy layer at M1 per ARCH-D9 (open follow-up).
Values listed under 'variables' are KEYS only — values are entered via Railway dashboard.

build._note_dockerfilePath: Forge writes this at M1; at M0 the path does not yet exist — service deploy is gated until then.

deploy._note_startCommand: Worker process polls pg-boss in a loop; never exits cleanly. Railway restart-on-exit ensures liveness if the loop crashes.
deploy._note_healthcheck: Worker exposes a tiny HTTP server on PORT (Railway-assigned) returning 200 if the pg-boss client is connected and last-job-poll succeeded within 60s.
deploy._note_numReplicas: 1 always-on at M1 launch; horizontal scale to 2-3 at peak load (M2+). Workers are stateless; horizontal scale is just more containers polling pg-boss.

service.name: runner-worker
service._note_sleepMode: Sleep would miss queue polls. NEVER enable.

_note_variables: These KEYS are documented in architecture/iac/railway/project.md §'Env-vars'. Values are set via Railway dashboard (or `railway variables set <K> <V>`) at M1 by Jo; never committed.

security_opts_spec._note: Railway exposes security-opts via the dashboard at the service level. Set these manually at M1 ship per ARCH-D8.

network_policy_spec._note: Cilium NetworkPolicy enforced at M1 per ARCH-D9 (open). Egress allowlist hostnames listed below; YAML written by Shield at architecture/iac/runner-pool/network-policy.yaml.
